user.label: Navigation related to your user account

register.title: Registration
register.intro: After registering, we will send you a link to verify your e-mail address. You can login after verifying your e-mail address.

login.title: Login
login.nav-label: If you can't login, use these links.

forgot.title: Can't login?
forgot.intro: If you can't access your user account, we can send you either your user name or a link that resets your password. Simply select either password or user name, and provide your e-mail address.

reset-password.title: Reset password
reset-password.intro: Enter your new password. After saving you can login using your new password.

legend.required: Fields marked with a {icon} are required.
legend.password: When entering your password, we check if the password is secure enough. Insecure passwords are rejected.
